title: Implementing DeepMind innovation: Deep research API
summary: Google DeepMind presents the Deep research API, an offering for developers to implement agent-powered techniques using Gemini. The session demonstrates how to use Google Cloud infrastructure to integrate these agentic research capabilities into applications.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session introduces the Deep research API, a Google DeepMind offering that lets developers add agent-powered research techniques to their applications using Gemini. The demonstration shows how Google Cloud infrastructure supports integrating these agentic research capabilities. The takeaway is a concrete path for embedding DeepMind research methods into developer-built applications via the API and Gemini.
